overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing a slow drone orbit around a monumental stone angel statue atop a Gotham City building. The camera circles the winged sculpture against a starry night sky, with the illuminated GCPD headquarters and Gotham Clock Tower visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop monument overlooking gothic city skyline

agents.ego_description: executing a slow counter-clockwise orbit around the stone angel statue, maintaining focus on the sculpture's profile

entered.detail: large weathered bronze-green statue of a winged figure holding a sword and book, viewed from the side
art deco police headquarters with illuminated GCPD signage on the facade
tall gothic clock tower with twin illuminated clock faces and blue spires
distant gothic cityscape with various spires and illuminated windows against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cinematic view of a massive winged angel statue dominating the foreground, with the Gotham City skyline stretching behind. The camera slowly orbits left around the statue, revealing the GCPD building on the right and the iconic clock tower on the left, all set against a starry night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop monument with clock tower vista

agents.ego_description: continuing the orbital path to reveal the frontal aspect of the angel statue and the clock tower prominence

segments.scene_description: As the orbit continues, the GCPD building passes behind the statue and out of view, while the Gotham Clock Tower becomes more prominent on the left. The camera reveals more of the angel statue's frontal details, including the sword and book, against the backdrop of the sprawling city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, cinematic orbit around a monumental stone angel statue that gradually shifts the city backdrop from the GCPD headquarters to the Gotham Clock Tower. It begins with the massive winged sculpture dominating the foreground, while the camera glides left to reveal the illuminated GCPD building on the right and the distant clock tower on the left under a starry night sky. As the orbit continues, the GCPD building smoothly passes behind the statue and disappears from view, allowing the Gotham Clock Tower to become the primary focal point on the left. The scene then shifts to reveal the intricate frontal details of the angel, including its sword and book, as the camera completes its arc against the sprawling expanse of the city lights.
